title: NinFit
description:
OVERVIEW: Transform your room into a futuristic arena with NinFit – the perfect fusion of classic fruit-slashing action and modern fitness technology. No controllers, no expensive VR gear needed; all you need is a Webcam and the spirit of a true Ninja!

KEY FEATURES:

• Advanced AI Motion Tracking: Uses your webcam to track body movements in real-time with high precision. Your hands are the light-sabers!

• Workout Mode: Track your calorie burn as you move. Turn boring exercise into an exhilarating high-score hunt.

• Video Highlights: Automatically record your most impressive slashing moments to review and share with friends.

• Cyberpunk Glassmorphism Visuals: Experience a sharp, modern, and inspiring futuristic interface.

WHY NINFIT? In the world of NinFit, sweat is power. The game not only entertains you after stressful hours but also serves as a companion on your journey to better health. Get ready to swing your blades and burn calories today!
description_short: NinFit: The ultimate body-controlled fruit-slashing action game via Webcam. Leverage AI technology to turn your real-life movements into powerful Ninja slashes. Have fun while burning calories with smart Workout modes and a sleek Cyberpunk aesthetic. No controllers required – just move!
